diff:
diff --git a/src/urls.py b/src/urls.py
index ff13c91..1f42897 100644
--- a/src/urls.py
+++ b/src/urls.py
@@ -1,2 +1,8 @@
 def join_url(base, path):
-    return f"{base}/{path}".replace("//", "/")
+    # Avoid collapsing scheme slashes (e.g., http:// becomes http:/)
+    if base.endswith('/') and path.startswith('/'):        
+        return base + path[1:]
+    elif not base.endswith('/') and not path.startswith('/'):        
+        return base + '/' + path
+    else:
+        return base + path
